positive: An abstract minimalist illustration featuring a majestic golden retriever dog silhouette leaping joyfully over a winding river made of liquid gold. The background is a stylized, watercolor gradient of deep sapphire blue merging into teal and soft violet. Use geometric overlay elements like clean dashed lines and simple starbursts to add visual interest. The composition must be perfectly centered and symmetrical, suitable for a high-contrast apparel print. Clean lines, vector art style, high contrast, maximal negative space.
negative: blurry, jpeg artifacts, text, signature, low quality, amateur, out of frame, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, noise, watermarks, logos, trademarks
